theme_and_archetype.rationale: For professional HGV/LGV truck drivers navigating often at night or under high-stress conditions, a 'Tactical Minimalism' approach is best. Deep Obsidian anchors the UI, eliminating glare, while high-contrast Volt Blue and Safety Amber draw attention strictly to navigational cues and critical safety warnings.

typography.strategy: System-native or easy-to-load Google Fonts via Expo. Strong Condensed Sans for metrics (ETA, speed, distance) to maximize screen real estate, Geometric Sans for high-legibility body text.

fonts.display: Oswald, Barlow Condensed, or System Bold (Condensed)
fonts.body: Inter, DM Sans, or System Regular

TurnByTurnHUD.layout: Flex row, massive directional icon on left, Distance in Volt Blue, Next Street in White.
TurnByTurnHUD.typography: Distance should use h1_display font size.

WeatherAndWindStrip.style: Glassmorphism or Solid surface, rounded-full, p-2
WeatherAndWindStrip.elements: Wind icon + speed. If speed > 30mph, text color becomes Safety Amber. If > 50mph, Danger Red.

SafetyWarningsPanel.position: Floating below TurnByTurn HUD or side panel
SafetyWarningsPanel.style: Surface with 1px border. Background tinted slightly red (rgba(255,59,48,0.1)) if critical.
SafetyWarningsPanel.elements: Low bridge height limit, Weight limits, Sharp curves. Must use high-contrast icons.

TripBottomSheet.elements: ETA, Time Remaining, Distance. Action buttons for 'End Drive' or 'Report Hazard'.

TruckProfileSetup.layout: Scrollable form. Large inputs. Grid layout for dimensions (Height, Width, Length, Weight).
TruckProfileSetup.inputs: bg-black/50, border border-white/10, h-14, rounded-xl, text-white text-lg, p-4. Focus state: border-blue-500
TruckProfileSetup.toggles: Custom large switches for Hazmat routing, Avoid Tolls.

map_style.provider: OpenStreetMap via react-native-maps or leaflet webview
map_style.theme: Dark map tiles (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter or Stadia Alidade Smooth Dark) to blend with the UI. Route line should be thick Volt Blue (#007AFF).

image_urls.description: Dark highway driving at night, use as a cinematic background for the initial launch/onboarding screen with a dark gradient overlay.

accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure all text against the #1C1C1E surface exceeds WCAG AA (4.5:1).
accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use subtle layout transitions for expanding the bottom sheet. Turn banner updates should flash or scale slightly to catch peripheral vision.
accessibility_and_motion.touch: All buttons MUST have a minimum height/width of 48px to accommodate drivers with gloves or limited dexterity in a moving vehicle.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack_notes: Use React Native Expo. Styling can be done via StyleSheet or NativeWind. Translate Tailwind classes provided into appropriate StyleSheet objects if NativeWind is not configured.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_attributes: Add testID prop to all interactive elements (e.g., testID='truck-profile-save-button').
instructions_to_main_agent.map_implementation: Since standard OSM tiles are light, look for a dark mode tile provider URL or use map inversion filters if rendering a webview. If using react-native-maps with Google Maps, supply a dark JSON map style.
instructions_to_main_agent.weather_integration: Connect to Open-Meteo for route waypoints, display in the WeatherAndWindStrip.
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_vibe: Avoid cute animations or rounded soft aesthetics. The app must look like a piece of serious industrial machinery—tactical, sharp, and data-dense but readable.
